data.body:
Last month, Trauma and Orthopaedics ran their third 3rd annual casting course for resident doctors at Tunbridge Wells Hospital.

Surgical trainees from across the region had the chance to learn more about core plastering principles, including for common fracture patterns and more specialised casts.
